title: tripsacum hirsutum
intro: Tripsacum hirsutum, also known as big bluestem, is a type of perennial grass native to North America and is a member of the Poaceae family. The medicinal properties of Tripsacum hirsutum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Tripsacum hirsutum can be prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its roots and leaves can be dried and used in herbal supplements or tinctures.
